title: ornithogalum serotinum
intro: Ornithogalum serotinum, also known as the late-flowering star of Bethlehem, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ornithogalum serotinum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The plant is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
